about.title: Discretion you can rely on
about.body:
I am Krisztina Oláh, owner of MyHome Real Estate Agency.
I have been working in real estate since 2005. Our agency has been present in the premium property market since 2010.
We have helped countless Hungarian and international clients find their homes, and assisted property owners in finding the right tenants and buyers.
We specialize primarily in Budapest properties, but our portfolio also includes properties around Lake Balaton and the Pest region.
We have numerous exclusive mandates. Several lawyers, notaries and professional photographers support our work.
Our goal is to provide outstanding real estate services for premium properties — taking the burden off our clients' shoulders whether buying, selling, renting or letting, and helping them find the best offers.
We cooperate with several partner agencies, giving our clients access to their databases as well.
Our years of experience help us successfully close real estate transactions.
We save our clients time and energy by finding properties tailored to their needs, and sparing property owners from unnecessary phone calls and viewings.
Contact us — we hope to succeed together!

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We read every message personally and handle it with discretion. Write to us, call, or fill in the form below — whichever suits you best.
contact.formIntro: Whether you are buying, selling, renting or letting — we help discreetly and personally. Get in touch and we’ll be in touch shortly.
contact.messagePlaceholder: How can we help? (e.g. buying, renting, or selling a property)
contact.responseNote: We usually reply within 24 hours on business days.
